channel.title: Hussain
channel.description: Welcome to Astro Sphere, a portfolio and blog for designers and developers.

item.title: Hive Notes
item.description: An account-based notes platform currently exposing a login-first experience.

item.title: GMB Dashboard
item.description: An analytics-driven local SEO dashboard for Google Business Profile performance, seasonal trend planning, and campaign recommendations.

item.title: Hive Radar
item.description: A competitor intelligence and revenue leakage scanner for local service markets, with GMB-assisted targeting and opportunity analysis.

item.title: HiveTalk AI Voice Automation
item.description: An AI calling agent platform for 24/7 call handling, appointment booking, and lead qualification with live operational analytics.

item.title: Quantum Edge Solutions
item.description: A full-stack growth and development platform website showcasing SEO, automation, SaaS, web, and mobile delivery services.

item.title: Hive Tech Solutions
item.description: A full-service digital marketing & software development agency offering SEO, web & mobile development, ERP and all-in-one digital growth solutions.

item.title: Hass Roofing 1978
item.description: A modern, responsive, and high-trust roofing website showcasing Hass Roofing’s 45+ years of excellence.

item.title: Step-by-Step Guide: Deploying a MERN Stack Project on Hostinger VPS
item.description: A step-by-step guide to building an e-commerce store using Laravel for the backend, React with Tailwind CSS for the frontend, and an admin portal for product management.

item.title: Building an E-Commerce Store with Laravel Backend + React Frontend
item.description: A step-by-step guide to building an e-commerce store using Laravel for the backend, React with Tailwind CSS for the frontend, and an admin portal for product management.

item.title: AJ&K – PSC Job Portal
item.description: An end-to-end online job application and examination management system with secure registration and real-time analytics.

item.title: E-commerce Store
item.description: A clean and modern full-stack e-commerce platform with React (Vite) frontend and Laravel (SQL) backend, designed for easy product, order, and user management.

item.title: WDD – Women Development Department
item.description: A network will also be established among the WDCs which will helpful for respective universities / Govt. colleges.

item.title: MSSU-Medical Social Service Unit
item.description: A centralized platform for managing patient social support records with role-based access and dynamic dashboards.

item.title: AI Tools Showcase
item.description: A responsive and visually engaging platform that demonstrates the power of modern AI tools.

item.title: Collective Marriages Programme
item.description: A comprehensive dashboard for managing applicant data with automated updates and district-wise visualization.

item.title: TrenchStation
item.description: A trading platform with real-time market data, portfolio management, and dynamic filtering for seamless user experience.

item.title: Music Game App
item.description: An interactive music-based web app for learning, playing, and engaging with sound through gamified experiences.

item.title: Women Enterprenurial Professional Expo
item.description: A dashboard for efficient data management with automated updates and dynamic filtering for applicant insights.
